title: Publish the Septuple workboard
summary: Build the shared claim board and keep its task state current.

title: Make malformed rule recovery explicit
summary: Shorten the missing-direction error and prove the editor recovers without a reload.

title: Measure solver strategies across every level
summary: Compare fixed-work search methods with reproducible counts and uncertainty.

title: Replace the tutorial set with Pattern Machine
summary: Teach the intact rule first and separate later syntax into concept-sized checkpoints.

title: Study account and player navigation
summary: Archived: account control too large; Players deferred until grading exists.

title: Allow finite slow qualification runs
summary: Run finite machines for millions of steps without retaining millions of debugger frames.

title: Show complete compile and runtime errors
summary: Show the exact error in the central diagram and replace simulator controls with a disabled red FIX COMPILE ERROR bar until compilation succeeds.

title: Redesign level navigation
summary: Define the level-detail and navigation structure before another save interface is built.

title: Restore prior machine sources
summary: Let a player retrieve an older submitted source without replacing the public best.

title: Calibrate search-resistance scores
summary: Estimate normalized search work to dominate a result and report uncertainty honestly.

title: Show frontiers and score distributions
summary: Expose States and Steps frontiers plus observed player score distributions.

title: Redesign parser grammar
summary: Replace ordered regex patches with tokenization, a small grammar/AST, semantic validation, and compatibility diagnostics; include q0: 0 -> 1 R HALT.

title: Preserve Pareto-best public submissions
summary: Keep a worse new submission in history without replacing the player's public best.

title: Lowercase original input in Neighbor XOR
summary: Make the Neighbor XOR instruction match the game's established lowercase voice.
